rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same two material correctness errors in the diff (vacuous : True fields in ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup at lines 67/73 making the classes defeq to parents, and IsUnipotent typing/docstring mismatch at line 55 between GroupLike vs AlgPoints/G(k)); acting on either produces the same fixes (real radical defs or TODOs, plus IsUnipotent type/docstring alignment) with no distinguishing real issue one surfaces that the other misses.
